techniques.after: Pipeline has normalized tokens + relevance features; downstream stage is metadata selector.
techniques.before_after_mermaid:
flowchart LR
  A["Before: Raw query"] --> B["query_normalizer + query_tokens + relevance_scorer"]
  B --> C["After: normalized tokens + relevance features"]
  C --> D["Downstream: metadata selector"]
